parent_references: This Amendment between Fiserv Solutions, LLC (“Fiserv”) and FiCare FCU (St. Joseph’s Hospital Credit Union) (“Client”) (“Amendment”) to the Master Agreement dated April 29, 2013, as amended through the date hereof (the “Agreement”) between Fiserv Solutions, Inc. and Client (Fiserv and Client each a “Party” and collectively, the “Parties”) is made effective as of the last signature date below (“Amendment Effective Date”).
Defined Terms. Except as defined herein or otherwise required by the context herein, all capitalized terms used in this Amendment have the meaning set forth in the Agreement.

Additional Deliverables. The Schedule listed below and attached hereto is hereby added to the Agreement for Fiserv’s provision of such Deliverables to Client and shall be added to the list set forth in Section 1(a) of the Agreement:
CheckFree Bill Payment and Delivery Services Schedule to the ASP Services Exhibit

On the terms and subject to the conditions set forth below, Fiserv and Client hereby enter into this CheckFree Bill Payment and Delivery Services Schedule (this “Schedule”), and agree that this Schedule shall be incorporated into and made subject to the provisions of the Agreement.

Subject to the terms and conditions of the Agreement, Fiserv grants to Client during the Term a non-exclusive, nontransferable right to display the Popmoney Marks, solely in connection with Client’s use of the Popmoney Service.

In the event of termination or non-renewal of this Schedule or the Agreement, Client shall: (a) comply with all applicable laws, including laws governing notification of Customers prior to discontinuation of the use of the Services; and (b) be financially responsible for any transactions returned on any of its Customers’ Accounts after the termination date, whether or not the returns are proper and timely.
Notwithstanding anything in this Schedule or the Agreement, Fiserv has the right to discontinue the Popmoney service upon twelve (12) months notice.
All Implementation Fees are payable on the date this Schedule is incorporated into the Agreement.

Notwithstanding anything to the contrary in the Agreement, Client will indemnify, defend, and hold harmless and release Fiserv and its Affiliates and their officers, directors, and employees from and against any claims, actions and other proceedings, damages, liabilities costs, and expenses (including reasonable attorneys’ fees) arising from or related to any breach of the preceding representation and warranty or this Section .2.(a) (Compliance).
FICARE FCU/FICARE-FEDERAL-CREDIT-UNION--.supersedes_text: In the event of a conflict between the terms of this Amendment and the Agreement, this Amendment shall control.
